description: Style NoteHitting all the season's fashion notes right, this pair of sandals from catwalk is a closet essential that'll go with all your summer favourites. You can wear this to snazz up a simple look, but don't forget to style them with tonal accessories!Product DetailsTapering toed sandal with thong style straps (with shimmer details)Matte effects on a beige footbed with a heel patchTPR outsole with a kitten heelHeel: 1.5"Material and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
